title: GridShow Property
description: Specifies whether to display the grids for the vision sequence.
notes:
Specifies whether to display the grids when executing the sequence.

Note:  If millimeter is specified in the GridUnits property, the grids are displayed only when calibration specified by the sequence is completed.
